title: EDUCATION - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of classes in cooking, home gardening, disaster preparedness, and business development. Topics include food gardens, protecting natural resources, resiliency during difficult times, and entrepreneurship. 485 Daily Lane Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by class Email (503) 304-3754 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3754 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for current class schedule and to sign up FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 8am-4pm Services: Cooking Classes Gardening/Landscaping Instruction Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Business Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - KITCHEN RENTAL FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE FOOD - MARKETPLACE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
